# Enercon

**Category:** Power Infrastructure, Switchgear and PDUs, Containerized Data Centers
**Website:** https://www.enerconpower.com/ehouses

## Headline
Provider of E-houses and transportable electrical enclosures for modular, utility, and mission-critical deployments.

## Overview
Enercon strengthens the market map around modular electrical packaging and transportable power infrastructure. Its relevance comes from the E-house angle, which fits neatly with modular data center and packaged power deployment models.

## Key capabilities
- E-house solutions
- transportable electrical enclosures
- turnkey power packaging

## Best fit for
- buyers comparing packaged electrical infrastructure
- teams needing transportable switchgear/control systems
- projects where modular electrical housing reduces complexity
